chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4308 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.29697/2019 2. For hearing of Misc. No.3870/2015 3. For hearing of Misc. No.20913/2014 4. For hearing of main case 24.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is pointed out that provisional release has been affected pursuant to this petition, however, final assessment is restrained. In view hereof learned counsel states that it may be just and proper for the department to assess the G.D. finally in accordance with law including without limitation to judgment in the case of Collector of Customs vs. Osaka Electronics and Industries Co. reported as 2022 PTD 836, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the department has no cavil to the disposal of the petition as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
